prompt_used: This is Lead Investigator Mara Quinn. Keep your channel open and do not answer unknown callbacks. A dead rail line broadcasts private confessions in the players' own voices. Start with spectrogram of confession burst, then verify every timestamp against abandoned commuter rail control annex. If The Curator of Static contacts you directly, preserve the message before you react.
source_prompt: Story: Static Between Stations (static-between-stations) | Hook: A dead rail line broadcasts private confessions in the players' own voices. | Subgenre: psychological horror | Tone: CINEMATIC | Location: Abandoned commuter rail control annex | Villain: The Curator of Static | Villain worldview: Truth is only what survives the loudest channel. | Motifs: radio hiss, clock hands, platform chimes.
